creator: jpp@cloudview.com
text:
I'm also seeing the problem  - setting mpsafenet=0 doesn't fix it for me 
but setting sysctl dev.em.0.tx_int_delay=0 does seem to suppress the 
problem.

jeeves# uname -a

19:40:01 PDT 2007
